news.headline: SAU plans to appeal SACSCOC decision after being removed from membership in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on December 10, 2024, the Southern Association of Colleges and Schools Commission on Colleges (SACSCOC) Board made the decision to expel Saint Augustine's University (SAU) from membership after their annual meeting in Austin, Texas. Despite this action, SACSCOC acknowledged that SAU successfully addressed certain issues...

news.headline: Duke Energy Florida grants $100,000 to Pinellas Education Foundation, reaching $4 million in company donations.
news.summary: Duke Energy has recently extended its support to Pinellas County Schools by contributing to the Future Cities program and improving activities at Enterprise Village and Finance Park. This latest donation brings the total amount of contributions made by the company to over $4 million. The collaboration was announced in St. Petersburg, Florida on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: John Clay Wolfe of GIVE ME THE VIN acquires 42 rare cars, worth $2 billion in annual revenue. Up for auction Dec 18.
news.summary: On December 18, the entire lot will be up for auction at the GMTV Garage in Dallas. This event is hosted by John Clay Wolfe, the president and founder of GIVE ME THE VIN™ (GMTV), the leading vehicle wholesaler in the country. GMTV boasts almost $2 billion in annual revenues and holds an A+ rating.

news.headline: Realty ONE Group offers Phoenix agents choice to unaffiliate from NAR, becoming fastest-growing franchisor.
news.summary: Realty ONE Group International, a rapidly growing franchisor, based in Phoenix, announced on December 10, 2024, its decision to offer agents an alternative to membership in the National Association of REALTORS®. The company, known for its YOU-First focus, aims to provide a distinct identity in the market. This move comes as part of the brand's commitment to providing a unique and dedicated experience for agents. With impressive growth numbers and a reputation for being a modern, purpose-driven lifestyle brand, Realty ONE Group International is establishing itself as a formidable player in the real estate industry.

news.headline: Inventor creates new toilet paper dispenser, NON - DRY WIPE, to improve control & reduce waste.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024, an inventor from Silver Spring, Maryland shared the inspiration behind his creation of the NON - DRY WIPE toilet tissue holder. Focused on enhancing control and reducing tissue paper waste, he aimed to provide a solution for a common household issue. The specially designed holder offers a unique feature that ensures a clean finish after each use, transforming the bathroom experience.

news.headline: Pokeworks introduces OG Poke Bowl as a limited-time special. Available only from Dec 10. #Poke #Foodie #LimitedTime
news.summary: A popular premium poke franchise is introducing a new take on a poke classic with the launch of the limited-time only OG Poke Bowl. The dish will be available starting from December 10th. Pokeworks, a prominent fast-casual poke chain based in Irvine, California, is rolling out this bold twist on the original poke bowl. The OG Poke Bowl promises to be a vibrant and unique addition to their menu, offering customers a fresh and exciting dining option.

news.headline: 51 counterparties take $174.842b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Sodexo predicts 5 campus dining trends for 2025, focusing on bold flavors & dishes. Students seek vibrant culinary experiences.
news.summary: Sodexo Campus, a prominent college food service provider based in Bethesda, Md., has revealed five upcoming campus dining trends for the year 2025. Industry insiders predict that students will seek vibrant and bold food experiences in the coming year. This will include a variety of fusion foods, decadent desserts, and more. Chef Jennifer DiFrancesco, Sodexo's Director of Culinary Innovation, emphasized that 'bold' will be the central theme influencing the evolution of campus dining in 2025.

news.headline: Biden: Raising tariffs would be a major mistake.
Munchkin named on Fast Company's 2024 "Brands That Matter" list for its cultural impact, trusted brand status.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Munchkin Inc., a baby lifestyle company owned by WHY Brands Inc., has been recognized by Fast Company on its Brands That Matter list. The list honors brands making a cultural impact and forming strong connections with consumers. Munchkin is acknowledged for being a trusted brand among parents globally, known for its innovative products and engaging content. This marks the company's inclusion in the fourth annual list by the prestigious publication.

news.headline: Rev Group's stock has surged 64% this year, poised to break out; reports fourth-quarter earnings.
news.summary: Rev Group announced its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday ahead of schedule. The company, known for its success during the Covid-19 pandemic, has seen a remarkable 64% increase in its stock value this year. With this positive momentum, Rev Group is now on the verge of a significant breakthrough in the market.

news.headline: Oracle's stock dropped due to a narrow earnings miss, despite gaining Meta as a customer. AI push shows momentum.Characters: 98
news.summary: After Oracle reported lower-than-expected earnings, its stock experienced a decline in value. Despite this setback, analysts remain optimistic about the company's AI initiatives, noting the ongoing momentum in that area. One notable development is Meta becoming a customer of Oracle. This news was followed by a drop in Oracle's stock price due to the narrower earnings miss. This information was highlighted in an article on a financial news website.

news.headline: Trump's tough mass deportation vow drives prison stocks up; CoreCivic anticipates increased demand for ICE detention beds.
news.summary: The tightening of immigration policies under the Trump administration may lead to an increased demand for ICE detention beds and the potential renewal of a previous contract. CoreCivic has indicated a willingness to engage in discussions ahead of time. The recent strong stance on mass deportations by Trump has resulted in a surge in stock prices for prison companies.

news.headline: Raydium surpasses Uniswap in DEX volumes for 2 consecutive months, according to Messari.
news.summary: Raydium, a decentralized exchange native to Solana, surpassed Uniswap in trading volumes during October and November. This data was reported by Messari, indicating a substantial increase in activity on the platform during those months.

news.headline: Thomas F. Rosenbaum appointed Chairman of Society for Science's Board of Trustees, Feng Zhang as Vice Chairman.
news.summary: Feng Zhang, currently holding the position of James and Patricia Poitras Professor in Neuroscience at MIT, has been appointed as Vice Chairman. The Society for Science revealed that Thomas F. Rosenbaum has been chosen as the Chair of its Board of Trustees. This announcement was made in Washington on December 10, 2024. Rosenbaum, who is the ninth president of the organization, will be taking on this new role.

news.headline: Hydron Energy partners with FortisBC to evaluate INTRUPTor™ gas solution - collaboration agreement signed.
news.summary: A collaboration agreement has been signed between Hydron Energy Inc. and FortisBC Energy Inc. in North Vancouver, BC on December 10, 2024. Hydron Energy Inc., known for their affordable INTRUPTor™ gas upgrading solution, aims to work with FortisBC to assess the potential use of their technology. This collaboration indicates a significant step for both companies in exploring cleaner fuel options.

news.headline: Sport Clips Haircuts partners with Military Spouse Employment to offer new career opportunities - Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A company founded by veterans has partnered with the Military Spouse Employment Partnership in Georgetown, Texas on December 10, 2024. Sport Clips Haircuts, the top provider of men's and boys' hair care services in the nation, joined forces with this initiative.

news.headline: Newtek Bank, N.A. and Apiture win IBSi Global FinTech Innovation Award for effective partnership. Deposits tripled in 2023.
news.summary: Newtek Bank, N.A. experienced a significant increase in deposits in 2023, seeing a tripling in their deposit numbers. This growth was facilitated through the utilization of the Apiture Digital Banking Platform.

news.headline: Vow ASA announced final results of rights issue on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Vow ASA released an update on the final outcomes of the rights issue on the stock exchange. This announcement from the company provides crucial information for investors and shareholders.

news.headline: US 3-Year Note Auction
ETS Performance expands with first youth athletic training facility in Queensbury, NY, offering elite programs to empower young athletes.
news.summary: A state-of-the-art athletic training facility has recently opened in Queensbury, New York, offering elite programs designed to empower young athletes. ETS Performance, a renowned provider of innovative youth sports performance training programs, is behind this expansion. The facility provides top-notch training opportunities for athletes looking to enhance their skills and abilities. With a prime location in Queensbury, this new facility is set to cater to the needs of athletes in the state. The addition of this facility signifies ETS Performance's commitment to fostering athletic development and success in New York. This move is expected to benefit a considerable number of young athletes in the region, offering them access to high-quality training programs to aid in their growth and improvement.

news.headline: J.F. Lehman & Company raises $2.2 billion for Fund VI, surpassing target. Specializes in aerospace, defense, maritime sectors.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a key middle-market private equity firm, J.F. Lehman & Company ("JFLCO"), which specializes in sectors such as aerospace, defense, maritime, government, and environmental, declared the completion of its newest primary fund. This fund, known as JFL..., marks a significant milestone for the firm.

news.headline: Crunch Fitness opening $5 million, 55,000 sq ft facility in Port St. Lucie, FL this winter.
news.summary: A new Crunch Fitness location in Port St. Lucie, Florida, called Crunch Port St. Lucie, is set to open its doors this winter. The facility, spanning 55,000 square feet and costing $5 million, will offer state-of-the-art fitness services. This site is operated by a franchisee of Crunch Fitness.

news.headline: Rose Villa partners with HealthyLifetime program from University of Michigan for independent aging. Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: A senior living community in Portland, Oregon, known as Rose Villa Senior Living, disclosed a collaboration with HealthyLifetime™, an independent aging program based on research by University of... The program aims to enhance the well-being of seniors by offering tailored support and resources to promote healthy aging. This partnership showcases Rose Villa's commitment to providing top-notch services for its residents.

news.headline: Always Best Care Senior Services opens in Friendswood, TX. Led by an experienced medical professional with 15+ years, it offers compassionate care to seniors in the local community.
news.summary: Always Best Care of Friendswood, led by a medical professional based in South Houston with over 15 years of experience, is set to offer compassionate care to the senior community in the local area. The franchise, part of Always Best Care Senior Services, is a prominent player in senior care. The initiative aims to address the needs of the elderly population in Friendswood and surrounding areas. This is a significant development in the healthcare sector that is poised to make a positive impact on the lives of seniors. The team's expertise, along with the support of the franchise system, will ensure top-notch service for the elderly residents. This venture marks a new chapter in senior care in the region, with an emphasis on quality, compassion, and experience.

news.headline: Therap introduces Certified Trainer Program to enhance user empowerment with advanced training.
news.summary: In Torrington, Connecticut on December 10, 2024, Therap Services, a prominent provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and various human services industries, announced a significant expansion of their support services. This expansion aims to cater to a wider range of clients in need of their electronic documentation solutions, covering a variety of sectors. Therap Services is recognized nationally for their expertise in this area and their commitment to compliance with HIPAA regulations.

news.headline: USRA announced 2024 Distinguished Undergraduate Award recipients, recognizing academic excellence in space science/engineering.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, the USRA revealed the winners of the 2024 USRA Distinguished Undergraduate Awards, recognizing outstanding young talents in the fields of space science and engineering. This year's awardees exemplify exceptional promise in their respective areas of study.

news.headline: Factor4 and GoTab POS integrate to expand gift card program at Majestic Neighborhood Cinema Grill in Broomall, PA, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In BROOMALL, Pennsylvania, on December 10, 2024, Factor4, a prominent supplier of gift card and loyalty programs, revealed a fresh partnership with the GoTab entertainment commerce system. This collaboration offers increased adaptability and expansion for Majestic Neighborhood Cinema Grill, integrating a seamless experience for its customers.

news.headline: Inventor creates SPILL SAVER kit for airless paint sprayer, aims to prevent spills. (DCD-394)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024, an inventor from Roanoke, Virginia shared the inspiration behind the SPILL SAVER. As a painting contractor, they envisioned a kit comprising a connection collar and container suitable for all airless paint sprayer brands. This invention aims to minimize mishaps related to paint spillage during usage.

news.headline: US 3-Year Note High Yield Actual 4.117% (Forecast -, Previous 4.152%)
US 3-Year Note Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.580 (Forecast -, Previous 2.600)
Analyst: BTC safe over $88k despite bearish candle on daily chart. Speculation if Bitcoin might crash again.
news.summary: Bitcoin recently experienced a bearish engulfing candle on its daily chart, indicating a negative shift in market sentiment. Despite this, one market analyst remains optimistic, stating that Bitcoin's price remains stable as long as it stays above $88,000. This suggests that there is still confidence in Bitcoin's value among investors, even in the face of short-term bearish indicators.

news.headline: ArcelorMittal prices €1 billion bond issue with 3.125% notes due 2028 and 3.500% notes due 2031.
news.summary: Yesterday, ArcelorMittal announced the pricing of €1 billion in notes consisting of €500 million 3.125% notes due on December 13, 2028 (2028 Notes) and €500 million 3.500% notes due on December 13, 2031 (2031 Notes). In total, the offering included a combination of these two Notes from the company.

news.headline: MasterCraft partners with GM, making Chevrolet Silverado official truck & tow vehicle. Promising innovation, reliability for boating enthusiasts.
news.summary: A new exclusive partnership has been formed between two top-performing companies, aiming to bring innovation, reliability, and unforgettable experiences from personal spaces to waterfront areas. This collaboration combines the strengths of two industry leaders to provide unparalleled services. The partnership is set to make a significant impact in the market, promising enhanced offerings and lasting memories for customers. Keep an eye out for this dynamic duo as they revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Controversial influencer Andrew Tate questions Bitcoin's impact on capitalism with concerns of deflation causing economic issues.
news.summary: Influential figure Andrew Tate has sparked debate by questioning the impact of Bitcoin's rapid ascent on traditional capitalist structures and investment practices. Tate voiced concerns in a recent online video, expressing worries that Bitcoin's exceptional profitability may divert capital away from conventional assets such as real estate and businesses. He cast doubt on the sustainability of economic development amidst Bitcoin's increasing prominence, suggesting potential issues with capital misallocation and a risk of deflationary pressure impeding growth. Tate's provocative remarks on Bitcoin's deflationary qualities possibly causing an economic downturn have stirred reactions within the Bitcoin community, who defend the cryptocurrency's positive influence on markets and society.

news.headline: 2025 Channel Partners Conference & Expo to feature key speakers: Chris McChesney, Shawnee Delaney, CEOs of ConnectWise and N-able. Event in Vegas on March 24-27.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a star-studded lineup of speakers, including best-selling author Chris McChesney, former Defense Intelligence Agency (DIA) officer Shawnee Delaney, ConnectWise and N-able CEOs, will headline the 2025 Channel Partners Conference and Expo in Las Vegas from March 24-27. McChesney and Delaney, known for their expertise in strategy execution and cybersecurity, are part of the agenda. This year’s event promises valuable insights from industry leaders to the anticipated audience.

news.headline: Lattice Semiconductor launches new small and mid-range FPGA offerings at developers conference, including Lattice Certus-N2 general purpose FPGAs.
news.summary: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC) unveiled groundbreaking hardware and software solutions at the Lattice Developers Conference 2024. The latest offerings include the Lattice Nexus™ 2 small FPGA platform and the Lattice Certus™-N2 general-purpose FPGAs, representing the inaugural device family under this platform. These advancements promise enhanced connectivity, performance, and security features. The announcement was made during the conference where the company showcased its edge to cloud FPGA innovation.

news.headline: Treasury WI 3y yield 4.116% before $58 billion auction.
Circle and Binance collaborate to expand global stablecoin use. Binance to boost USDC access; Circle to provide liquidity, tech support.
news.summary: Binance has announced plans to increase accessibility of USDC on its platform, partnering with Circle to enhance liquidity, technology, and establish valuable new connections. This collaboration aims to facilitate broader usage of USDC within the Binance ecosystem, potentially impacting a significant number of users and investors.

news.headline: San Benito Health Care District provides update on HHMH lease negotiations with Insight, progress continues.
news.summary: In Hollister, California on December 10, 2024, the San Benito Health Care District shared updates on the lease-to-own deal between Hazel Hawkins Memorial Hospital (HHMH) and Insight. The transaction is moving forward with substantial advancements.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi Finance Week's Asset Abu Dhabi event spotlights global asset management industry trends with notable partners.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Abu Dhabi, the second day of Abu Dhabi Finance Week (ADFW) took place, featuring the 2024 Asset Abu Dhabi forum. This event, hosted by ADGM, saw participation from theme partners ADCB, Mubadala, and PGIM Global Asset Management. Discussions were held on various topics relevant to the financial sector.

news.headline: James B. Beam Distilling Co. introduces Beam Private Barrel Club for consumers to select single barrels at Clermont, Kentucky. Over 229 years since inception.
news.summary: Celebrating more than two centuries since Jacob Beam began whiskey sales in 1795, enthusiasts of the famed James B. Beam Distilling Co. are now able to personalize their own exclusive barrel at the Clermont, Kentucky distillery. Located in Clermont, Kentucky, this distinguished distillery has opened its doors for fans to choose their private barrels marking a significant milestone in the company’s history.

news.headline: GameChange Solar helps meet ITC deadlines with Genius Tracker for ground-mounted PV projects.
news.summary: A company based in Norwalk, Connecticut, GameChange Solar, renowned worldwide for its solar tracking and racking solutions for ground-mounted PV projects, is helping solar project developers fulfill their Investment Tax Credit (ITC) safe harbor needs. Through its innovative Genius Tracker™, the company is assisting developers in meeting their requirements efficiently and effectively.

news.headline: Annual holiday call-in show featuring odd lots on Bloomberg.
Matthews International responds to Barington Capital, focusing on driving long-term value creation. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Pittsburgh-based Matthews International Corporation (NASDAQ GSM: MATW) released a statement addressing a recent communication and nomination received from Barington Capital Group. The Company acknowledged the received statement and nomination notice from Barington.

news.headline: Neo Financial launches new Neo World Mastercard and Neo World Elite Mastercard with top-tier cashback rates for Canadians.
news.summary: Neo Financial Technologies Inc. has unveiled two new cashback credit cards, the Neo World Mastercard® and the Neo World Elite® Mastercard, aiming to provide Canadian consumers with enhanced rewards on their daily purchases. These cards offer competitive cashback rates to assist consumers in addressing the increasing cost of living. As individuals seek to optimize their spending, these cards stand out with their lucrative cashback incentives.

news.headline: PPG named as one of Foundry’s Computerworld’s Best Places to Work in IT in 2025, marking its 7th appearance on the list.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh today, PPG (NYSE: PPG) revealed its latest achievement - being named among the top workplaces for IT in 2025 by Foundry’s Computerworld. This marks the seventh time PPG has made it to this esteemed list. The recognition is awarded to companies that push their IT teams with opportunities and offer attractive benefits and pay packages. PPG's Vice President and Chief, Bhaskar Ramachandran, expressed pride in the acknowledgment, stating, “It’s a great honor to again be recognized for excellence in our Digital IT function.”

news.headline: Discovery Point Mooresville, a leading childcare franchise, opened its new center in Mooresville, NC. Over 50 communities served since 1988.
news.summary: In Mooresville, North Carolina, a new center by Discovery Point Child Development Centers, a renowned educational childcare franchise, has recently opened its doors. Established in 1988, Discovery Point now operates in more than 50 communities across the Southeastern region.

news.headline: Colangelo & Partners chosen as the agency for The Consorzio Alto Adige Wines, to boost US presence. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: The Consorzio Alto Adige Wines has recently revealed a key collaboration with Colangelo & Partners aimed at strengthening their foothold in the United States market. This partnership, announced in New York on December 10, 2024, is significant as the Consorzio Alto Adige Wines represents the majority of the region's wine makers. Their primary goal is to boost the awareness and sales of wines from this region in the U.S. This move is part of their strategy to expand their presence and reach a broader audience in the American market.

news.headline: We're Live In 10! Join us as we walk through navigating FX Price Action and News Trading
